creator: f451@imap.cc
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #1)

I tried it with a new poudriere jail (in the course of trying to get round the problem, the original environment was destroyed), no src.conf or make.conf, testport a fresh tree like so:

poudriere testport -j test -J10 x11-toolkits/gtk20

and it builds fine now.

Shall I close this or do you want me to close it?
